summary: Completed testing of TripSync new features including mock email notifications, guest edit capability, auto-suggestion, slot prices, flight coordination APIs, and UI/UX overhaul with Cormorant Garamond fonts. Backend APIs are fully functional, frontend features partially tested due to routing issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Heatmap page navigation redirects to landing page despite successful authentication

integration_issues.issue: After successful login, navigation to heatmap page redirects back to landing page

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/email-log - SUCCESS (shows 2 mock emails after locking dates)
Backend: GET /api/trips/guest/1FKCbgUkdiu9cqepJvEF_g/check/Test%20Guest%20User - SUCCESS (returns found=true with date_ranges)
Frontend: Landing page renders with new hero image and Cormorant Garamond heading - SUCCESS
Frontend: Guest page at /guest/1FKCbgUkdiu9cqepJvEF_g shows edit capability - SUCCESS (previously submitted name detected, email pre-filled, button shows 'Update my dates')
Frontend: Authentication flow works correctly - SUCCESS
Frontend: Dashboard access after login - SUCCESS

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (7/10 tests passed - routing issues prevent full heatmap testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend routing issue: Heatmap page navigation redirects to landing page despite successful authentication. The protected route /trip/{tripId}/heatmap is not properly handling authenticated users and redirects them back to the landing page. This prevents testing of heatmap auto-suggestion banner and share link section features.
